_meta.query: What are the 16 levels of scale in the Standard Model? List them from L-3 to L12 with their names.

response.content:
The 16 levels of scale in the Standard Model of Code, from L-3 to L12, are:

| Level | Name         |
|-------|--------------|
| L12   | UNIVERSE     |
| L11   | DOMAIN       |
| L10   | ORGANIZATION |
| L9    | PLATFORM     |
| L8    | ECOSYSTEM    |
| L7    | SYSTEM       |
| L6    | PACKAGE      |
| L5    | FILE         |
| L4    | CONTAINER    |
| L3    | NODE         |
| L2    | BLOCK        |
| L1    | STATEMENT    |
| L0    | TOKEN        |
| L-1   | CHARACTER    |
| L-2   | BYTE         |
| L-3   | BIT/QUBIT    |

*(Source: `standard-model-of-code/docs/MODEL.md` and `standard-model-of-code/docs/theory/L1_DEFINITIONS.md`)*
